451 ROUTE_RSDNT_HC_EXCHG_INFO_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_HC_EXCHG_INFO_CD Patient Trans - Health Info Exchange CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver was via a health information exchange. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
